calendar.title: CTF Calendar
calendar.scrollToView: Scroll down to view the game calendar

init.title: Initialize
init.welcome1: Welcome to choose Ret 2 Shell as your all-in-one information security training solution!
init.welcome2: Next we will go through several steps to set up the basic information required for the platform to run.
init.welcome3: First, enter the token required to initialize the platform, which will be present in your configuration file when deploying the platform.
init.welcome4: If you forget your init token, please contact devops to check the platform configuration file to find the init token.
init.platformNameRequired: Please fill in the platform name
init.footerInfoRequired: Please fill in footer ownership information
init.footerUrlRequired: Please fill the link which point to footer ownership info
init.subjectUrlRequired: Please fill in the link pointed to by the subtitle, which can be the same as the ownership link
init.nameTips: Please give the platform a name.
init.subjectUrlPlaceholder: Please enter a link which points to subtitle
init.recordPlaceholder: Please enter the website registration information. This is only required for public websites in China.
init.hideMaker: Hide development team information in footer
init.signingKeyPlaceholder: Please fill in the key, please use a random string, this item does not need to be remembered
init.expiresTimePlaceholder: Please fill in the expiration time
init.bufferTimePlaceholder: Please fill in the buffer time
init.authWarning: Warning: The following fields will affect the issuance and verification of user credentials. If you do not understand what these are, please click next button without modification.
init.captchaDifficultyPlaceholder: Please enter the verification difficulty, between 0 and 9
